name: Privacy Policy Acceptance Block
text: This Privacy Policy is published by the organisation in accordance with applicable Indian law. By accessing or using our services, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by this Privacy Policy. This Policy was last updated on the date indicated above and supersedes all prior versions.

legal_basis.note: Consent must be specific and informed

title: Acknowledgement
dispute_hotspots: Version control — user consented to old version, company claims compliance with new version
